fundamentals.name: Reddit, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Reddit, Inc. operates a digital community in the United States and internationally. The company's platform enables user to engage in conversations, explore passions, research new hobbies, exchange goods and services, create new communities and experiences, share laughs, and find belonging. It also organizes communities based on specific interests that enable users to engage in conversations by sharing experiences, submitting links, uploading images and videos, and replying to one another. Reddit, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with excellent margins and a strong balance sheet, trading at a reasonable forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 79.1%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 69.1% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 679.8% indicate strong top-line and bottom-line acceleration.
Gross margin 91.4% and operating margin 27.6% demonstrate exceptional profitability.
Forward P/E of 16.22 is attractive given the high growth rates and PEG ratio of 1.01.
Total cash of $2.77B significantly outweighs total debt of $21.29M, resulting in a very healthy balance sheet.
Last quarter's EPS beat of 79.1% suggests strong operational execution.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 40.93 and Price/Sales of 11.15 suggest the stock is not cheap on historical or current sales metrics.
Beta of 1.85 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.
The stock price has recently pulled back, creating uncertainty about near-term price action.

news.paragraph: Reddit's valuation is under scrutiny following a recent share price pullback, with conflicting fair value signals emerging. While the company has demonstrated significant revenue and earnings growth, including a substantial beat on its last reported quarter, the market appears divided on its current valuation. The upcoming earnings report on July 30th will be key to determining if the recent price action reflects a temporary dip or a more fundamental reassessment of its growth prospects.

headlines.title: Reddit (RDDT) Valuation Check After Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
